economic_notes: Upper Nicola Band wholly owns Upper Nicola Holdings Limited Partnership. Non-controlling interest in Stuwix Resources Joint Venture. Interest in Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership. All Nations Trust Company investment held at cost. Stuwix Resources JV paid $1,419,654 for contract services during the year.
notes: Auditor firm name not explicitly stated — identified only as 'Chartered Professional Accountants' in Vancouver. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Upper Nicola Holdings Limited Partnership and Stuwix Resources Joint Venture. Spayum Holdings LP financial statements not available at time of issuance. ISC Recovery line item shows $0 actual (was negative $125,343 in prior year). Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($6,399,407) + FNHA ($1,520,268) + FNESC ($520,466) + CMHC ($89,929) + ISETS ($11,513) + Other Province of BC ($165,006) + ISC deferred from prior year ($1,388,214) less ISC deferred to future year (-$2,468,266) less Other deferred to future year (-$201,809) plus other government funding ($0) = approximately $7,424,728 net; however gross government transfers before deferral adjustments are higher. OSR calculated as total revenue minus identified government transfers. COVID-19 measurement uncertainty noted. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided financial statements.
